$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema for this config file.

max_repos.description: Maximum number of cached repositories. When exceeded, repos are evicted based on the eviction_strategy.

cache_loc.description: Directory where cloned repositories are stored. Repos are placed directly at <cache_loc>/<owner>/<repo>/. Supports ~ for the home directory.

eviction_strategy.description: Strategy used to evict repos when max_repos is exceeded. 'lru' removes least recently used, 'fifo' removes oldest cloned, 'largest' removes the largest repo by disk size.
